short.en: ESP32 and Arduino firmware — sensors, OLED UIs, BLE/Wi-Fi, motor control, persistent storage.
short.sl: Firmware za ESP32 in Arduino — senzorji, OLED vmesniki, BLE/Wi-Fi, krmiljenje motorjev, trajno shranjevanje.

long.en: I write firmware that survives field use. ESP32, ESP32-S3, and Arduino, in MicroPython or Arduino IDE. I/O over I2C and SPI, OLED user interfaces (SH1106 / SSD1306), rotary encoders, BLE, motor drivers, and Preferences-backed persistent state. Bring me a sensor and a goal — I will build the loop that runs it.
long.sl: Pišem firmware, ki preživi vsakodnevno rabo. ESP32, ESP32-S3 in Arduino, v MicroPythonu ali Arduino IDE. Vhodi/izhodi prek I2C in SPI, OLED vmesniki (SH1106 / SSD1306), rotacijski enkoderji, BLE, gonilniki za motorje in trajni stanje prek knjižnice Preferences. Prinesi senzor in cilj — zgradim zanko, ki ga poganja.

en: What the device should do, step by step
sl: Kaj naj naprava počne, korak za korakom
